description: Structure and lifecycle rules for wiki/snapshot.md — one-page active projects context.

format.title: # Wiki Snapshot — Active Projects

properties: context: brief project goal and current status

update_rules.trigger: every ingest/query that adds or changes related wiki pages
project completed — entry moved to wiki/projects/, removed from snapshot.md

format.rule: agent never loads wiki/snapshot.md if user is not working on a project. session starts with wiki/index.md + wiki/overview.md.
